ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample processed */,
  "percent_assigned" REAL /* Percentage of reads assigned to the reference */,
  "m_assigned" REAL /* Number of reads assigned to the reference */,
  "percent_aligned" REAL /* Percentage of reads aligned */,
  "m_aligned" REAL /* Number of aligned reads */,
  "percent_trimmed" REAL /* Percentage of reads trimmed */,
  "percent_dups" REAL /* Percentage of duplicate reads */,
  "percent_gc" REAL /* Percentage of GC content */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the sequence */,
  "percent_failed" REAL /* Percentage of reads that failed */,
  "m_seqs" REAL /* Number of sequences generated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the sample belongs */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for sequencing */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., DNA, RNA) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "processed_by" TEXT /* User who processed the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the project's goals and outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the sample */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample for which metrics are recorded */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content percentage of the sample */,
  "duplication_rate" REAL /* Rate of duplication in the sample */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence in bp */,
  "failed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of reads that failed */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Overall quality score of the sample */,
  "qc_pass" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sample passed quality control */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_results" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample aligned */,
  "aligned_reads" REAL /* Number of reads that were aligned */,
  "alignment_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of reads that were aligned */,
  "reference_genome" TEXT /* Reference genome used for alignment */,
  "alignment_software" TEXT /* Software used for alignment */,
  "alignment_version" TEXT /* Version of the alignment software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trimmed_reads" (
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trimmed reads record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample for which trimmed data is recorded */,
  "trimmed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of reads that were trimmed */,
  "trimmed_reads" REAL /* Number of trimmed reads */,
  "trim_software" TEXT /* Software used for trimming */,
  "trim_version" TEXT /* Version of the trimming software */,
  "trim_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the trimming process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_id")
)
